title: Liam's Client Side
description: A modpack I made to be 100% compatible with vanilla
body:
This is the modpack I use as my main instance and thought I would share it with the world. somtimes stuff might break, if you find a issue please let me know on discord @liamtheninja5. 

This modpack adds many diffrent quality of life addations to the client along with performance boosting mods like Sodium. I also added some viusal imporvements like 3D skin layers and more player animations. along with some optional tools that I find useful.

# Optional mods
- Auto Clicker
- Axiom
- Client Commands
- Chest Tracker
- WorldEdit
- Auto Lectern
- Flashback
- Litematica
- Vivecraft
